narration: What if your body had a secret to balance water? It does.

narration: ADH, or Antidiuretic Hormone, governs how your kidneys manage water.
visual_description: Context visual: ADH, or Antidiuretic Hormone, governs how your kidneys manage water.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: ADH, or Antidiuretic Hormone, governs how your kidneys manage water.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: ADH, or Antidiuretic Hormone, governs how your kidneys manage water.

narration: When you're dehydrated, ADH tells your body to hold onto water, preventing loss.
visual_description: Escalation visual: When you're dehydrated, ADH tells your body to hold onto water, preventing loss.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When you're dehydrated, ADH tells your body to hold onto water, preventing loss.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When you're dehydrated, ADH tells your body to hold onto water, preventing loss.

narration: Studies show that imbalances can lead to serious health issues, from dehydration to overhydration.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show that imbalances can lead to serious health issues, from dehydration to overhydration.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies show that imbalances can lead to serious health issues, from dehydration to overhydration.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show that imbalances can lead to serious health issues, from dehydration to overhydration.

narration: Understanding ADH helps us appreciate how our body strives for balance.
